opening_line: Hi - I read a review where Mark mentioned tidy finishes on a job with BBR Plumbing & Heating Bristol - Bristol Boiler Repairs. That stood out.
source_quote:
Bristol Boiler Repairs, and in particular Chris, were very helpful in providing quotes for 3 boilers and guiding us to the most appropriate one for our property.  They also prioritised the work as our existing boiler had broken.
Installation was completed on time and the work was tidy and unobtrusiv
why_this_angle: Lead with review detail about tidy finishes (Mark)
suggested_whatsapp: Hi, Julius here. I build websites for local trades. One of your Google reviews from Mark mentioned tidy finishes - I mocked up a one-page site around that. No obligation - want a quick look?

follow_up_replies.text: One-page site from £300. Includes mobile layout and quote form.
No problem - I will remove the preview. Thanks for your time.
